fallback_actions.summary: Proceed with the admitted degraded write path only after the weaker guarantee is disclosed.
Review encoding, metadata, and target-identity risks before continuing.
Route the write to a new admitted target instead of weakening the current one.
Review the staged content against the current authoritative target before committing.

notes: Notebook saves stay source-fidelity aware even when structured metadata is the material risk.
scenario: A notebook document saved on a local root keeps encoding, newline, BOM/final-newline, and logical-target cues visible while format-on-save must rebase or abort on any external drift.
